problem: Malcolm can run a race at a speed of 6 minutes per mile, while Joshua runs at 8 minutes per mile. In a 10-mile race, how many minutes after Malcolm crosses the finish line will Joshua cross the finish line if they start the race together?

classified_questions.question: How long does Malcolm take to run 1 mile?
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.question: How long does Joshua take to run 1 mile?
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.question: How many miles do they need to run in total for the race?
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.question: If they start the race together, how many minutes does it take for Malcolm to finish the race?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How many minutes does it take for Joshua to finish the race?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How many minutes after Malcolm crosses the finish line will Joshua cross the finish line?
classified_questions.label: b
